ddls:
CREATE TABLE "flight_periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time period */,
  "period_name" TEXT /* Name of the time period (e.g., 7 Days, 15 Days) */,
  "duration_days" INTEGER /* Duration of the time period in days */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the time period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the time period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the time period */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the route of the flight */,
  "total_flights" INTEGER /* Total number of flights in the period */,
  "on_time_flights" INTEGER /* Number of on-time flights */,
  "delayed_flights" INTEGER /* Number of delayed flights */,
  "canceled_flights" INTEGER /* Number of canceled flights */,
  "average_delay" REAL /* Average delay in minutes for delayed flights */,
  "average_departure_delay" REAL /* Average departure delay in minutes */,
  "average_arrival_delay" REAL /* Average arrival delay in minutes */,
  "max_delay" INTEGER /* Maximum delay in minutes */,
  "min_delay" INTEGER /* Minimum delay in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_performance_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES flight_periods ("period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_performance_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "origin_airport" TEXT /* Origin airport code (e.g., JFK, LAX) */,
  "destination_airport" TEXT /* Destination airport code (e.g., SFO, ORD) */,
  "route_distance" INTEGER /* Distance of the route in miles */,
  "route_frequency" INTEGER /* Number of flights on this route per week */,
  "average_route_duration" REAL /* Average duration of the route in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_destination_airport FOREIGN KEY ("destination_airport") REFERENCES airports ("airport_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_origin_airport FOREIGN KEY ("origin_airport") REFERENCES airports ("airport_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the route of the flight */,
  "flight_number" TEXT /* Flight number (e.g., AA123) */,
  "scheduled_departure" TEXT /* Scheduled departure time */,
  "actual_departure" TEXT /* Actual departure time */,
  "scheduled_arrival" TEXT /* Scheduled arrival time */,
  "actual_arrival" TEXT /* Actual arrival time */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the flight (e.g., On Time, Delayed, Canceled) */,
  "delay_minutes" INTEGER /* Delay in minutes (0 if on time or canceled) */,
  "aircraft_type" TEXT /* Type of aircraft used for the flight */,
  "operating_airline" TEXT /* Airline operating the flight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airport */,
  "airport_code" TEXT /* Airport code (e.g., JFK) */,
  "airport_name" TEXT /* Name of the airport */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the airport is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the airport is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the airport is located */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the airport */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the airport in feet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., operations manager, data analyst, customer service) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance record being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES flight_performance ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
